topic: My dashcam catches the same hitchhiker on the same empty road every night.
title: The Same Hitchhiker On My Dashcam Every Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My dashcam caught the same hitchhiker on the same empty road every single night.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark rural road through a car windshield, a distant figure standing on the shoulder, headlights cutting fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is the road I take home from work.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty two lane country road at night, faint moon, fields on either side, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same spot. Same coat. Same stillness.
scenes.image_prompt: a lone figure in a long coat standing motionless at a roadside, seen from behind, headlight glare, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At first I thought it was just a tired traveler.
scenes.image_prompt: a dashcam view of a silhouette on the road shoulder, grainy night footage, headlights, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But he never moved as I passed.
scenes.image_prompt: a still figure at the edge of headlight beams, head turned slightly, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked older footage. He was there a year ago, identical.
scenes.image_prompt: a laptop screen showing grainy old dashcam clips of a roadside figure, dim room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So one night I slowed down to look.
scenes.image_prompt: a car slowing on a dark road, brake lights glowing red on the asphalt, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He was already in my back seat.
scenes.image_prompt: a rear view mirror reflecting a dark shape in the empty back seat, faint dashboard glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The dashcam glitched every night at the exact same second after.
scenes.image_prompt: a frozen distorted dashcam frame, static lines across a dark road, headlights, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the footage showed me stopping, opening the door, letting him in.
scenes.image_prompt: a dashcam still of a car door open on a dark roadside, interior light spilling out, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I take a different route now. He waits there anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: an alternate empty highway at night, distant lone silhouette under a far streetlamp, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the dashcam recorded the drive I never took.
scenes.image_prompt: a dashcam screen playing footage of a moving dark road while the car sits parked in a garage, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
